name: create_followup
description: Log a human-callback request, clinical concern, or other issue outside booking. Use when the caller asks for a person, raises a medical concern, or needs staff follow-up. Tell the caller someone will call them back — NEVER claim an immediate live transfer is happening.
execution_message_description: Brief acknowledgement while logging the request.

category.description: human_requested when the caller wants a person; clinical_concern for medical issues; other otherwise.

notes.description: Clear summary of what the caller needs.

patient_id.description: Optional patient UUID if already identified.

phone.description: Optional override; defaults to the caller's from_number.
